properties.comment: English language file for tjhxml2bib https://github.com/nlct/texjavahelp GPL-3.0 Nicola Talbot
properties.entry: {0} (or {1}) <dir> The directory containing the helpset subdirectory.
{0} (or {1}) <file> <locale> Include given license file the specified locale. The <locale> may be empty if there is only one license file for all locales.
{0} (or {1}) <locale-list> The list of supported locales (cumulative). Omit if no locale sub-directories.
{0} (or {1}) <prefix> The prefix used for the locale sub-directories.
{0} <name> The name of the helpset sub-directory within the input directory (default: {2}).
{0} (or {1}) <tjh-file> The output TJH file (name formed from {2} if omitted).
Only one input directory and output file permitted
Unable to parse encoding from file {0}: {1}
Helpset directory ''{0}'' not found (use the {1} switch to set the appropriate name)
